sourceTitle: Responsible and ethical use of AI - Student Academic Success
evidenceSnippetOriginal: Monash enterprise systems such as Copilot have enterprise data protections identified under the green shield in Monash Copilot. To be safe, you can use your Monash email address to access Microsoft Copilot which provides data protection for Monash.
evidenceLocator: Responsible and ethical use of AI page, Privacy section and Top tips section
